description_long: This object consists of a group of five cardboard parcels stacked together, each box sealed with strips of white packing tape. The boxes are of similar size and have a light brown, slightly matte finish typical of corrugated cardboard. Some of the boxes display standard black shipping symbols, such as 'fragile', 'this side up', and 'keep dry', printed on their sides. The arrangement is irregular, with one box resting atop the others, creating a slightly unstable stack. The surfaces show subtle creases and folds, indicating the flexible yet sturdy nature of cardboard. The overall appearance suggests these parcels are ready for shipping, storage, or delivery in an urban environment.
description: A group of five light brown cardboard boxes, taped shut and stacked with visible shipping symbols on some sides.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing three boxes with visible shipping symbols and clear white tape on top surfaces.
description_view_1: Left-rear view highlighting the staggered arrangement and more visible tape, with symbols on two box faces.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back sides of the boxes, with shipping symbols on three visible faces.
description_view_3: Right-rear view showing the top box and the rightmost box with shipping symbols, emphasizing the stack's height.
